channel.title: PSV — PlayersB fixtures
channel.description: Recent and upcoming fixtures for PSV on PlayersB.

item.title: 2026-01-28 (H) PSV 1-2 FC Bayern München
item.description: PSV played FC Bayern München (H) on 2026-01-28. Competition: Champions League. Status: FINISHED.
